summary: Iteration 72: Complete 10-Step Onboarding Wizard Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 API tests passed (save-config, complete, skip, status, plans). Frontend: All 10 steps verified with Playwright (Welcome, Confirm Account, Role Decision, Initial Setup with 3 tabs, Menu Setup, Rewards Setup, Table Setup, Floor Plan Builder, Reservation Setup, Finish). Conditional steps appear correctly based on enabled modules. After completion, user redirects to /venue/home and does NOT see onboarding again.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning in select dropdown. Minor issue, does not affect functionality.
Console warning: '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' - nested button in category delete. Minor issue, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: InitialSetupStep.js line 253-259 - select element has span wrapper causing hydration warning
Minor: PulseMenuSetup.js line 170 - delete button nested inside category button causing hydration warning
seed_data_creation: None - using protected users from protected_users.py which reset on backend restart
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully tested. Key data-testids: onboarding-wizard, onboarding-welcome, onboarding-get-started, onboarding-confirm-account, onboarding-venue-name, venue-type-{restaurant|club|lounge|bar}, onboarding-confirm-continue, onboarding-role-decision, role-yes, role-no, create-manager-yes, create-manager-later, manager-name-input, manager-email-input, onboarding-initial-setup, setup-tab-{payments|team|modules}, payment-{bartendersCanCloseChecks|serversCanCloseChecks|cashierOnly}, add-team-member, module-{pulse|tap|table|kds|reservations|events}, onboarding-menu-setup, menu-cat-{category}, menu-add-item-btn, menu-item-name, menu-item-price, menu-submit-item, onboarding-rewards-setup, rewards-use-setup, rewards-customize, onboarding-table-setup, table-gen-count, table-generate, onboarding-floor-plan, floor-add-table, onboarding-reservation-setup, reservation-activate, onboarding-finish, onboarding-enter-system. Backend restart resets teste1@teste.com to onboarding_completed=false.

Backend API Tests.POST /api/onboarding/complete: PASS - Marks onboarding complete, saves all config

Frontend Step Tests.Step 1 - Welcome: PASS - Shows spet icon, title 'Welcome to spet.', subtitle, 'Get Started' CTA
Frontend Step Tests.Step 2 - Confirm Account: PASS - Venue name input, multi-select venue types, Continue disabled without data
Frontend Step Tests.Step 3 - Role Decision: PASS - Yes/No role cards, conditional manager form when 'No' selected
Frontend Step Tests.Step 4 - Initial Setup: PASS - 3 tabs (Payments, Team, Modules), sequential tab navigation, mutually exclusive payment options, add/delete team members, 6 module options with pulse pre-selected
Frontend Step Tests.Step 5 - Menu Setup (conditional): PASS - Category sidebar, items area, add item form with ingredients and extras
Frontend Step Tests.Step 6 - Rewards Setup (conditional): PASS - Live preview, quick setup vs customize, impact panel, campaigns, AI suggestions
Frontend Step Tests.Step 7 - Table Setup (conditional): PASS - Generate tables feature, table cards with zone/capacity/status
Frontend Step Tests.Step 8 - Floor Plan Builder (conditional: PASS - Canvas with positioned tables, drag support, zoom controls
Frontend Step Tests.Step 9 - Reservation Setup (conditional): PASS - Live preview animation, quick setup, settings toggles
Frontend Step Tests.Step 10 - Finish: PASS - Shows icon, 'You're all set', venue name, checklist, 'Enter System' CTA

Navigation Tests.Progress bar updates: PASS - Progress bar and step dots update correctly
Navigation Tests.Navbar elements: PASS - Back button (except step 1), brand logo, theme toggle, logout
Navigation Tests.After completion redirect: PASS - User redirects to /venue/home and does NOT see onboarding again

conditional_steps_logic.Menu Setup: Appears when pulse, tap, or table module is enabled

conditional_steps_logic.Table Setup: Appears when table module is enabled
conditional_steps_logic.Floor Plan Builder: Appears when table module is enabled
